name: Snapper Supreme Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the red snapper into bite-sized pieces and place in a baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.
3. Place remaining ingredients in a frying pan and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour seasoned tomato sauce over the fish.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
6. Remove bay leaves and stir mixture until fish flakes and is thoroughly combined.
7. Cool completely and refrigerate. Serve chilled in a lettuce-lined bowl with crackers or rye rounds.
Do-Ahead Note: Snapper supreme can be made ahead of time and frozen.
